title: Split Array into Consecutive Subsequences
titleCn: 分割数组为连续子序列

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,3,4,5] Output: true Explanation: nums can be split into the following subsequences: [1,2,3,3,4,5] --> 1, 2, 3 [1,2,3,3,4,5] --> 3, 4, 5
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: nums can be split into the following subsequences: [1,2,3,3,4,5] --> 1, 2, 3 [1,2,3,3,4,5] --> 3, 4, 5

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,5] Output: true Explanation: nums can be split into the following subsequences: [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,5] --> 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,5] --> 3, 4, 5
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: nums can be split into the following subsequences: [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,5] --> 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 [1,2,3,3,4,4,5,5] --> 3, 4, 5

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,4,5] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to split nums into consecutive increasing subsequences of length 3 or more.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to split nums into consecutive increasing subsequences of length 3 or more.
